auth.tagline: Indicator-driven signals · One click to MT5
auth.errorFailed: Failed. Please check email and password

signals.title: Live Trading Signals
signals.subtitle: Auto-generated by the technical indicator engine
signals.empty: No signals yet, the engine is analyzing the market…

order.riskNote: Trading involves risk. This command will be sent to your connected MT5 account. Please verify volume and side.
order.ackTimeout: No receipt yet, check the Orders page for the latest status
order.eaOffline: No MT5 connection online, cannot place order
order.noBridge: No MT5 connected yet. Open the PRISMX Bridge app, paste your token and start it, then place the order.
order.allOffline: All connected MT5 accounts are currently offline. Make sure the PRISMX Bridge app is running and MT5 is logged in, then retry.

positions.closeSent: Close command sent, waiting for receipt…
positions.modifySent: Modify command sent, waiting for receipt…

bind.title: Connect MT5
bind.subtitle: Run the PRISMX Bridge app and paste your token to connect your MT5 accounts
bind.accountsHint: Accounts reported by the PRISMX Bridge app. Multiple MT5 terminals show up here.
bind.tokenHint: This token is like a password. Keep it safe. Paste it into the PRISMX Bridge app to connect.
bind.resetConfirm: Resetting invalidates the old token immediately. Any running Bridge app must be updated with the new token, or it will fail to connect. Reset?
bind.suffixHint: If your broker's symbols carry a suffix (e.g. the .sc in GBPUSD.sc), enter it here. It will be appended to the symbol when placing orders. Leave empty for none.

steps.title: Setup Steps
steps.s2: Download and run the PRISMX Bridge app on the PC where MT5 is logged in
steps.s3: Paste the token into the Bridge app and start it
steps.s4: Wait until the connection status turns online, then trade from the signal panel
